title: Rulemaking
doc_html:
§1360.111. Rulemaking

            The board shall promulgate all rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary for the regulation of the profession of genetic counseling in accordance with the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 2018, No. 593, §1.
doc_text:
§1360.111.  Rulemaking
The board shall promulgate all rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure
Act as are necessary for the regulation of the profession of genetic counseling in accordance
with the provisions of this Part.
Acts 2018, No. 593, §1.
